home.heroTitle: The best deals, hand-picked for you
home.heroSubtitle: We hunt real discounts on Amazon, Mercado Libre and Éxito, and publish them with direct links so you always buy at the best price.
home.newsletterTitle: Get the best deals in your inbox
home.newsletterSubtitle: Join the newsletter and be the first to know about discounts worth grabbing. No spam.
